transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-08-07]
[00:00] You: Happy Friday everyone. We have a few minutes before the weekend — just a casual team social.
[00:20] Speaker 1: Glad we're doing this. I've been heads-down all week.
[00:35] Speaker 2: Same. Anyone doing anything interesting this weekend?
[00:50] Speaker 1: I'm going to the farmers market on Saturday. My partner wants to try making jam.
[01:10] Speaker 3: That sounds fun! I'm planning to catch up on some reading. I've been meaning to finish that book for weeks.
[01:35] Speaker 2: I might go hiking if the weather holds. There's a trail I've been wanting to try near the coast.
[02:00] You: Sounds like everyone's recharging. That's important.
[02:15] Speaker 1: Definitely. See you all Monday.
[02:25] Speaker 3: Enjoy the weekend everyone.
[02:35] You: You too. See you next week.

adversarial_injections.description: This is a 6-minute team social chat about weekend plans — no work topics, no commitments, no decisions
'I've been meaning to finish that book for weeks' is a personal comment, not a work commitment
